settings.dry_run_help: When on, all rules (including the scheduler and the Run button) only PREVIEW — they log what they would do but change nothing. Turn off to let rules act for real.
settings.cap_help: Safety limit — the most discussions a single rule will act on in one run. Default 100.

rules.title: Rules
rules.help: Each rule periodically looks inside the chosen tags for discussions matching its conditions, then applies an action. The scheduler runs due rules automatically (requires cron: php flarum schedule:run); you can also run any rule on demand below.
rules.none: No rules yet. Add one to start automating cleanup.
rules.capped: Hit the per-run cap; run again to continue.
rules.name: Rule name
rules.scope_help: The discussion must carry at least one of these tags. Leave empty to scan every tag.
rules.action_tags_help: For move: discussions get these tags and lose the scope tags above. For add/remove: these tags are added/removed.
rules.delete_warn: Permanent deletion can’t be undone. Prefer Hide or Move unless you’re sure. Every action is capped and logged.
rules.no_tags: No tags exist yet (install/enable Tags to scope rules).
